name: White Chocolate Rasberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crust ingredients and press into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 8 minutes. Let cool.
3. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and flour in a large bowl with heavy duty mixer until very smooth.
4. Beat in eggs, one at a time (until blended).
5. Stir in milk, then white chocolate by hand.
6. Grease sides of prepared pan and pour in half of cheesecake mixture.
7. Sprinkle with half of raspberries (fresh or frozen).
8. Repeat with remaining cheesecake batter and raspberries, pressing the second layer of raspberries down into the batter so they don't dry out in the oven.
9. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
10. Reduce heat to 235°F and continue baking for one hour and thirty minutes or until done (center will no longer be sticky but will not appear cooked; it will firm up upon cooling).
11. Let cool to room temperature and refrigerate overnight.
12. Remove from pan.
13. Mix together topping ingredients and heat in microwave.
14. Spread cooled cake with chocolate and let stand until firm.
15. Decorate with whipped cream, chocolate curls, and raspberries.
